lastReleaseMessage: Restore dates.ts after a botched regex replacement in the...

barRaise.topFinding: The commit the last five reports kept asking for landed in full: f0ac594 (2026-06-12) committed both new test files, the write-dashboard-status.ps1 rewrite, and the SPA rebrand in one pass, and the working tree is now clean. That closes the standing reliability MEDIUM: the dashboard writer now targets YaS.json instead of the renamed-away Scheduler.json, so the next release updates the live dashboard instead of writing a stale orphan, and the auto-fill and generate-to-publish tests are in git history off the FUSE mount. One MEDIUM remains, now a single-file holdout: docs/DESIGN.md still reads 'Yes and... Scheduler' while README and the SPA rebranded to 'Yes& Scheduler', and the CHANGELOG v0.4.0/v0.4.1 entries are mis-dated 2026-05-26 against real 2026-06-07 commits. DESIGN.md is the read-before-any-task source of truth, so the holdout is the one worth a one-commit fix; everything else is carried LOW maintenance noise.
